name: Synapse Meeting Caption Scraper
description: Automatically scrapes captions from Google Meet, Zoom, and Teams web client meetings and sends them to your Synapse dashboard.

_permissions_justification.storage: Used to buffer captured caption lines locally in extension storage during active sessions to prevent data loss when popup is closed.
_permissions_justification.activeTab: Used to check the domain and title of the active meeting tab to display the appropriate platform status in the popup UI.

_host_permissions_justification.http://localhost:3000/*: Allows sending the buffered transcript data to the locally running Express backend server endpoint (/api/transcript) for summarization.
